name: DynaVap - Titanium Tip: Omni
summary: Enhance your vaporisation experience with DynaVap 's Titanium Tip: Omni.
description: Enhance your vaporisation experience with DynaVap 's Titanium Tip: Omni. This innovative design features a Nona notched extraction chamber that also serves as a built-in grinder, allowing for quicker heat exchange. The trisected 9 fin profile and Adjust-a-Bowl feature further optimise your vape experience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
